title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 18 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 18 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 18 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/09/2025
Iron ore futures moved downwards a er a higher opening today, with the most-traded contract I2601 closing at 800 yuan,down 0.12% from the previous trading day. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell; steel mills adopted a cau ous wait-and-see approach and purchased as needed. Market trading ac vity was moderate.
